since_last: 8% of 84 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.33%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 8% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -2.19% · Gold -2.10% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 8% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.33%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.33%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +9.59%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +9.59%, DV +4.90%, BIDU +4.60%, PUBM +2.93%, D +0.56%. Laggards: CGNX -5.60%, MU -5.23%, RXRX -5.21%, MRVL -5.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.05% at $149.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
